documents.text: My manager piled three deadlines on me and I stayed late again, totally burned out.
The project review went badly and I feel like I'm drowning under the pressure at the office.
I've barely slept in days, lying awake at 3am with my mind racing.
Another restless night. I keep waking up exhausted and foggy in the morning.
We argued again about the same thing and I don't feel heard by my partner.
Date night helped. We finally talked things through and I felt close to them again.
Sent out ten applications today and got another rejection email. The job hunt is exhausting.
Prepping for tomorrow's interview, nervous but hopeful about landing the role.
Grateful for the small things today: good coffee, a bit of sun, a walk with a friend.
I wrote down three good things that happened this week and felt lighter afterward.
Started a morning run habit and my energy is slowly coming back.
Skipped the gym all week and my body feels sluggish and tense.

queries.query: I can't cope with the workload and pressure at my job
I keep waking up at night and cannot fall back asleep
tension and conflict with my partner after a fight
searching for a new job and dealing with rejections
feeling thankful and appreciating the good moments
exercise, movement, and my physical energy levels
